# Thabet Amer - Full Profile

## Overview
Thabet Amer is a technical leader, solutions architect, and co-founder with 15+ years of experience spanning software engineering, cloud infrastructure, DevOps, product management, and startup leadership. Based in the US, working globally across the Middle East, Africa, South Asia, and Europe.

---

## Experience Timeline

### Co-founder - Stealth Medtech Startup (2025 - Present)
Type: Founder

### CTO, Tech Manager, Tech Lead - Startups & Innovative Mid-size (2018 - Present)
Type: Leadership

### Project & Product Manager - Innovative Startups (2020 - Present)
Type: Leadership

### DevOps Specialist - Startups & Scaleups (2018 - 2025)
Type: Technical

### Solutions Architect - Enterprise & Government (2012 - 2022)
Type: Technical

### Senior Systems Engineer - Software Houses (2009 - 2014)
Type: Technical

---

## Projects Portfolio

### Peanut Posse Platform (2025)
- Client: Apricot International
- Role: Tech Project Manager
- Description: Led product management and delivery through vague requirements and complex stakeholder landscapes, ensuring on-time project completion and upgrading team velocity.
- Tags: startups, product
- Location: United States (Central)

### Enterprise Solutions (2025)
- Client: Hunter Douglas
- Role: DevOps Consultant
- Description: Enterprise solutions and technology consulting.
- Tags: devops
- Location: United States (East)

### NFT.Co Platform (2024)
- Client: Unblocked Brands
- Role: Senior DevOps Consultant
- Description: Blockchain-based platform for NFT management and transactions. Maintained scalable Kubernetes production loads while significantly reducing AWS costs.
- Details: Optimized CI/CD workflows reducing build times from 55+ mins to 8 mins. Reduced infrastructure costs from $900+ to $70/month through optimization. Implemented IaC with Terraform and CDK-Java for AWS deployments.
- Tags: startups, devops
- Location: United States (West)

### AidKonekt Platform (2023)
- Client: Konektid International
- Role: Tech Lead & Scrum Master
- Description: SaaS platform for aid delivery and humanitarian coordination. Oversaw technical implementation of product roadmap and release schedules.
- Details: Managed JIRA-organized sprints, validated code reviews, and debugged critical issues. Automated release processes and led tech team through feature prioritization and requirement triaging.
- Tags: product
- Location: United States (East)

### Strengthening The Teaching of Primary Schools (2023)
- Client: Cambridge Education
- Role: Senior Product & Project Manager
- Description: Web and mobile platform for teacher observation, analysis, and professional development supporting over 20,000 teachers across Malawi.
- Details: Led technical implementation of cloud-hosted platforms. Prioritized and resolved feature requests through cross-functional dev and QA teams.
- Tags: edtech, product, ict4d, architecture
- Locations: Malawi, United Kingdom

### CARE Mobile Messaging Platform - CaMM (2023)
- Client: CARE International
- Role: Senior Product & Project Manager
- Description: MVP mobile messaging platform for COVID-19 health awareness and tracking with multi-channel communications capabilities in Bangladesh.
- Details: Successfully delivered MVP with mobile app and multi-channel comms. Integrated Twilio and Meta WhatsApp APIs for multi-channel outreach.
- Tags: cloud, product, ict4d
- Location: Bangladesh

### Monitoring & Evaluation Platform (2023)
- Client: IBTCI
- Role: Technical Lead
- Description: Monitoring and Evaluation (M&E) platform supporting development programs across Tunisia and Libya.
- Tags: ict4d, product
- Locations: Tunisia, Libya

### Agritech Platform (2023)
- Client: CNFA
- Role: Technical Lead
- Description: Agricultural technology platform supporting farmers and agribusinesses in Egypt with digital tools and market access.
- Tags: agritech, ict4d, product
- Location: Egypt

### Women Empowerment Platform (2023)
- Client: DAI
- Role: Technical Lead
- Description: Digital platform supporting women empowerment initiatives and economic opportunities in Afghanistan.
- Tags: ict4d, product
- Location: Afghanistan

### Job Matching Platform (2023)
- Client: EDC
- Role: Technical Lead
- Description: Job matching and workforce development platform connecting youth with employment opportunities in Rwanda.
- Tags: edtech, product
- Location: Rwanda

### Legaltech Platform (2023)
- Client: American Bar Association
- Role: Technical Lead
- Description: Legal technology platform supporting access to justice initiatives across Turkey, Lebanon, and Syria.
- Tags: ict4d, product
- Locations: Turkey, Lebanon, Syria

### Omnichannel/M&E Platforms (2022)
- Client: Souktel
- Role: Deputy CTO
- Description: Digital platform development for Souktel, delivering innovative technology solutions for mobile and web applications.
- Tags: startups, product, devops, ict4d, architecture
- Location: United States (East)

### Ahlan Simsim Platform (2022)
- Client: IRC / Sesame Street
- Role: DevOps Engineer
- Description: Mobile and web platform for promoting learning among young children across the Middle East with rich educational content.
- Details: Designed and built AWS and Pantheon-based infrastructure. Implemented CI/CD pipelines via CircleCI.
- Tags: edtech, cloud, ict4d, devops
- Locations: Jordan, Syria, Lebanon

### Education Management Information System - EMIS (2022)
- Client: Abt Associates
- Role: Senior Product & Project Manager
- Description: Web and mobile data collection and analysis platform supporting Malawi's National Reading Program.
- Tags: edtech, ict4d, product
- Location: Malawi

### Early-Stage Startup Systems (2022)
- Client: Multiple Startups
- Role: Cloud & DevOps Architect
- Description: System architecture design and CI/CD automation for multiple early-stage platforms.
- Details: Designed and implemented scalable, secure cloud systems on AWS for 4+ startups.
- Tags: startups, cloud, architecture, devops
- Locations: Palestine, Lebanon

### WIT - Water Irrigation Tech (2022)
- Client: Mercy Corps
- Role: Technical Consultant
- Description: Water irrigation technology solutions.
- Tags: ict4d, product
- Location: Jordan

### IQVIA DevSecOps Modernization (2020)
- Client: IQVIA (Healthcare/Pharma)
- Role: Senior DevOps Engineer
- Description: Enterprise-wide Docker image optimization and DevSecOps pipeline modernization for a global healthcare data company.
- Details: Eliminated 80% of container image size and 90% of security vulnerabilities. Refactored CI pipeline into modular pipeline-as-code using Groovy, Maven, and Ant. Deployed Kubernetes clusters with Helm Charts.
- Tags: devops
- Location: United Arab Emirates

### Additional Projects (Map-only)
- Digital Platforms for International Development - OBI International (United States East)
- Policy Making Tech - UNODC (Austria)
- Fintech Platform - Bisan Systems (Palestine)
- Engineering Leadership - Apricot International (United States West)

## Technical Skills
Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Helm, CDK
CI/CD: CircleCI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI
DevOps: Infrastructure as Code, Container Orchestration, DevSecOps
Architecture: Microservices, Serverless, Event-Driven
Project Management: Agile, Scrum, JIRA, Product Roadmapping
Platforms: Pantheon, Cloudflare, Vercel
Languages & Frameworks: Node.js, React, Python, TypeScript

## Sectors
ICT4D (Information and Communication Technologies for Development), EdTech, AgriTech, LegalTech, MedTech, FinTech, Blockchain/NFT, Humanitarian, Government, Enterprise
